title: balsamea mollis
intro: Balsamea mollis, also known as Chilean Balsam or Molle Balsam, is a plant native to South America, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Balsamea mollis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Balsamea mollis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
